sys_app_requirement.acceptance_criteria: Only Mon/Wed/Fri slots are presented to users. Slots outside 4 daily working hours or beyond 3 concurrent teachers are unavailable. Total daily capacity is 12 slots (4 hours x 3 teachers).
sys_app_requirement.description: Implement the availability engine that drives slot generation. Rules: lessons run Monday, Wednesday, and Friday only; each teacher works 4 hours per day; a maximum of 3 teachers can teach concurrently (one lesson per teacher per slot). Total daily capacity: 12 slots. The engine must be queryable in real time to populate the calendar widget.
sys_app_requirement.name: REQ-005: Teacher Availability Engine
